# AI Nexus — https://ainexustools.online
# llms.txt — machine-readable site index for AI crawlers
# Author: Navneet Arya
# Updated: 2026-04-28

> AI Nexus is an independent AI tools review site run by Navneet Arya.
> Every tool is personally tested before being reviewed. No sponsored reviews.
> Affiliate links are disclosed on every page. All tools are useful regardless of where you are based.

## About

- [About Navneet Arya](https://ainexustools.online/about): The person behind AI Nexus reviews. Testing AI tools since 2022 across writing, audio, video, design, and productivity.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://ainexustools.online/disclosure): Full disclosure of affiliate relationships. Navneet earns a commission if you upgrade through links on the site, at no cost to you.

## Tool Reviews

### Writing Tools
- [Grammarly Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/grammarly): AI writing assistant used by 40 million people. Grammar, tone, clarity, and plagiarism checking. Free + $12/month.
- [QuillBot Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/quillbot): Best AI paraphrasing and summarising tool. 7 rewriting modes, citation generator, plagiarism checker. Free + $9.95/month.
- [Rytr Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/rytr): Fast, affordable AI writing for everyone. 40+ templates, 30+ languages. Free + $9/month unlimited.
- [Writesonic Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/writesonic): SEO-optimised AI writing for blogs and ads. Article Writer, Chatsonic chatbot. Free + from $16/month.
- [Frase.io Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/frase): Research, write & optimise SEO content. AI content briefs, SERP analysis. From $15/month.

### Image Tools
- [Leonardo.ai Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/leonardo-ai): Production-quality AI image generation. Custom model training, consistent characters. Free + from $12/month.
- [PhotoRoom Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/photoroom): AI product photography used by 150 million people. Background removal, product photos. Free + $9.99/month.
- [Looka Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/looka): AI logo and brand identity design. From $20 one-time.

### Video Tools
- [Pictory Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/pictory): Turn articles and scripts into videos automatically. From $19/month.
- [Opus Clip Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/opus-clip): Turn long videos into viral short clips automatically. Free + from $19/month.
- [InVideo AI Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/invideo): Create faceless YouTube videos from a text prompt. Free + from $20/month.

### Audio & Podcast Tools
- [Podcastle Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/podcastle): Record, edit and publish podcasts with AI. Magic Dust audio enhancement, remote recording. Free + from $11.99/month.
- [Murf AI Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/murf-ai): Studio-quality AI voiceovers. 120+ voices, 20 languages. Free + from $19/month.

### Design Tools
- [Gamma Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/gamma): Build beautiful presentations and docs with AI. Free + from $8/month.
- [Beautiful.ai Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/beautiful-ai): AI presentation software that designs itself. From $12/month.

### Marketing Tools
- [Ocoya Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/ocoya): Write and schedule social media content 10x faster. AI captions + scheduling. From $15/month.

### Coding Tools
- [Replit Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/replit): Build and deploy full apps with AI in your browser. Free + from $7/month.

### Productivity Tools
- [Notion AI Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/notion-ai): AI built directly inside your notes and workspace. $10/month add-on.
- [Taskade Review 2026](https://ainexustools.online/tools/taskade): AI-powered tasks, projects and team collaboration. Free + from $8/month.

## Comparison Articles

- [Rytr vs Writesonic (2026)](https://ainexustools.online/compare/rytr-vs-writesonic): Which AI writing tool is worth it? Rytr wins on value for short-form; Writesonic wins for long-form SEO content.
- [Grammarly vs QuillBot (2026)](https://ainexustools.online/compare/grammarly-vs-quillbot): Different tools for different jobs. Grammarly for original writing; QuillBot for rewriting and paraphrasing.
- [Podcastle vs Descript (2026)](https://ainexustools.online/compare/podcastle-vs-descript): Podcastle wins on recording quality; Descript wins on transcript-based editing for video podcasts.
- [Ocoya vs Buffer vs Hootsuite (2026)](https://ainexustools.online/compare/ocoya-vs-buffer-vs-hootsuite): Ocoya wins for solo creators who want AI writing + scheduling; Buffer for pure scheduling; Hootsuite for agencies only.
